vault_already_initialized: Vault '{name}' is already initialized. Use 'veilt config set' to change settings.
vault_not_initialized: Vault '{name}' is not initialized yet. Run: veilt config init --password YOUR_PASSWORD
panic_mode_active: PANIC MODE is active: a suspicious access pattern was detected. The operation was rejected and decoy data was returned instead of failing loudly.
panic_mode_reset: Panic mode has been reset for vault '{name}'.
integrity_failed: Integrity check FAILED for '{id}': data may be corrupted or tampered with.
audit_chain_valid: Audit log chain is intact: no tampering detected.
audit_chain_broken: WARNING: the audit log chain is BROKEN - it may have been edited or tampered with.
purge_confirm: This will irreversibly delete vault '{name}' (all entries, config, and audit log). Re-run with --yes to confirm.
admin_required: This operation requires administrator/root privileges. Re-run with --admin, or call veilt.elevate.request_admin().
native_engine_unavailable: Native security engine unavailable on this platform: falling back to the pure-Python engine (reduced memory protection).
